response: To cut out sugar from your daily diet, start by reading food labels and avoiding items with [sweetener] or [added sugars]. Replace sugary snacks with fruits or nuts. Drink water instead of sugary beverages. Check hidden sugars in [processed foods]. Use natural sweeteners like cinnamon or vanilla. Limit desserts and sweets. Be mindful of sugar in sauces and dressings. Track your progress to stay motivated.
